title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Gary Feldman
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr Gary Feldman  Teacher reference number: 3949975  Teacher’s date of birth: 3 November 1956  Location teacher worked: Northwich, East of England  Date of professional conduct panel: 17 to 18 March 2025  Outcome type: Prohibition Order  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr Gary Feldman, formerly employed in Northwich, East of England.  "
